place: Bang Rak, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Three-Bedroom Garden Pool Villa in Bang Rak
blurb: An elegant three-bedroom pool villa in the heart of Bang Rak, on Koh Samui's north-east coast — single-storey living around a private pool with teal accents, a poolside sala and a bright open kitchen. Minutes to Big Buddha Beach and Fisherman's Village. ฿10,490,000.
detail:
Set in the sought-after Bang Rak area on Koh Samui's north-east coast, this single-storey villa is an easy, private home just minutes from Big Buddha Beach, Fisherman's Village and the airport. It occupies a 483 m² plot with 170 m² of built space, arranged around a private pool with a shaded poolside sala.

Inside, an open kitchen with a central island opens to bright living and dining areas that flow out to the pool terrace. Three double bedrooms each have an en-suite bathroom, with crisp interiors lifted by teal accents, air-conditioning throughout and full furnishing.

The pool terrace and sala are made for island living and entertaining, framed by lawn and tropical planting. The villa is held on a registered leasehold with approximately 26 years and 2 months remaining, running to September 2052. Lease terms, floor plan and inventory on request.
